# Delivery 1 — Version Summary

**Change summary**: First delivery of `prd-analysis` generative skill, generated by
skill-forge with Tier 1-3 cost optimizations active. 10 PRD-domain leaves authored
under sonnet pricing (writer fan-out), 1 critical + 7 error/warning LLM-tier issues
across R1/R3/R5 closed via 11 reviser dispatches under sonnet pricing across
revise rounds R2/R4/R6-fix. Cross-reviewer scope narrowed by Tier 2.4
scaffold-provenance auto-skip from 49 → 11 leaves (78% reduction).
